reviews.review_text: Content warning is super fun dont get me wrong but theres alot of downfalls. YOU NEED FRIENDS like 100% the game is fun and easy to goof around in but not personally enjoyable to play solo. The first couple matches feel wonderful but after time the map and few monsters become super repetitive and lose the danger [around 10 hours id say]. The game does have a really cool feature where you can see your lasts game footage from the cameras pov which helps the games funny-ness by alot. but overall not my favorite but good for the price of $8.

the game is fun and very funny with friends
js not fun when u die
A lot of fun with friends, preferrably 3-4. Reccomended, and a certified BANGER.
This game is very fun with friends. Its like record your friend getting killed then post to thousands of people.
First, this game is just a fun time with friends. my friends and I have screamed and laughed while playing and its also so creative. HIGHLY recomed
Good luck finding a game that isn't just children. No server browser.

this game is honestly very good but i never really got to try it because none of my friends had it and i just refunded it but when i did play alone it was fun but I advise you to play with your friends makes it 10x better.
It's a good little trip. Fun gameplay and hilarious reactions make this game easy to recommend to play with friends.
This game is really fun with friends & mods are just funny, I recommend you to buy this game.

Every time I play this game I have a blast, I have 3 other friends to play it with and it's great. You go down and film content for "Spooktube" It's such a simple premise and it became one of my favorite games to play with friends.

The game does have some technical issues, a friend when his mic wasn't already wasn't working earlier we couldn't hear him. We had to create a new lobby since no one can join after you start. Then we heard him.
This is a fun game but there is a glitch that prevents you from picking up items sometimes. this is completely game breaking and ruins the experience
I recomend it it is really fun wth multiple friends.It is more funny than scary and it has very funny ragdoll physics and the monsters desgins are weird and funny at the same time
This game is so fun to play witt friends. The game is great, but the physics make it a whole lot better. Would reccommend to a group of 3-4 people.

it was a little laggy but i think that was just my internet make sure you have cross play on in the settings when i did that i got so much more people and different people most games i think you should try the game if you like stuff like repo or lethal company
VERY WELL MADE they cooked and mods are free, one thing that bothers me, even with cross play it's hard to get in a not broken server i give a 8/10
realy fun to play with friends but my god the jump scares
This game is so aura bomboclat would recommend but dont play alone, play with friends its giga bomboclat diddy sus playing all alone

Fairly buggy, and I have lost runs many times due to the camera just not being where it dropped upon death and poor connection in co-op, but the highlight reels of my friends' most chaotic moments is unbeatable to watch back on. Quota runs are short so it's easy to put down and pick up where you left off, and always manages to make me laugh into a headache. Love it
One of the best games I've played so far, a must have if you like horror games with friends, sometimes will get a little boring if you play for a constant 2-3 hours in a day but still would recommend
this game is really fun no matter who you playwith unless their boring and there are some modders that may have bad stuff playing but when i found one evven tho he did that it was still really fun
Fun for like 20 minutes with friends, after the first 3 day group it gets repetitive and boring. Would recommend for a short play session with a group of friends, but not for long term play

Very nice game, especially if you playing with friends, a bunch types of monsters that you need to get views so basically its a game based on "blogging" if you get the amount need you go to the next day, if not you will die.  very interesting game , and really often funny, really reccomend it .
good game for like one day, dont recommend full price even though it was genuinely fun
This game was fun by my self for a bit, until I played with friends. Play this game with friends or it will not be fun at all.
it was hillarious to be with my trio and get straight up mauled by 5 different snails, helps bond with your friends ALOT, i hardly called my friends until we got this game
PEAK AS HECK But in all seriousness the game is fun and goofy and also keeps the horror aspect well
it is awesome, more fun if you play with friends, my friend got scared so many times but we enjoy it!
Such a good game fun with friends and randoms worth the purchase!!

Pretty cool game to play with friends, my friend group has a few extra people however so I wish we could have more than 4, maybe 6-8 would be better for me personally. Would also be cool to see them add customizations to the home base and whoever is the host it shows their world. Its actually pretty fun to play with the boys and just chill. not good solo, theres too many things you cant combat or instant kill you if you are solo, also the last night even if the camera makes it back to the bell but you die it doesnt give you the opportunity to review the footage like you can on the first two days so i hope they eventually let you do that instead of immediately failing, shouldnt fail me until i go to sleep IMO.
I LOVE this game. Not only is it a great single player experience, but playing with friends, creates such rememberable moments.
This game is so wild and fun! Just wish it wasn't so hard! The first amount of views to the second is a CRAZY jump that feels impossible (it's not). However overall 100/10 would recommend.
good game but gets repetitive quickly so you dont see the further parts of it

I am a sucker for Friend Slop, and this game delivers:

Content Warning is like a cartoony re-skin of Lethal Company. It provides humor, energy, and community all built around who you play with. Grab friends to play or the experience caves in on itself.

Play with friends. Enjoy an hour of slop. This is how games are meant to be.
very fun with friends, wouldn't rlly reccomend without friends lol
Really fun game I ENJOY this game a lot with my friends. it would be nice to be able to buy more cameras and/or be able to upgrade the camera really good game

one and done experience, after that the game is exceptionally boring, most of the very limited mods are buggy messes, i loved playing the game with my friends for the first few times but after that, it SUCKED. don't buy it, it's not worth the price.
this game is fun, exciting, and trolling. i love it
i love this game 50 percent because workshop and the other is for the actual game. also what does mc stand for?? does it stand for anything?? #swag
yes but not when you have friends that give you less than two minutes to join a game with content warning closed
its so funny to play with diffrent peoples with good funny monsters AND the gravity is weird so if you jump off a tall building you'll bounce into space which is even more funny

SUPER FUN!!! I love that you can watch your recording after you come back home. Its always hilarious to capture someone dying to a monster or saying something funny to the camera. I also like that you can save the best videos to your desktop so you can show them to other people.
I 100% would recommend this game! It's really fun and a good game to play with friends. like how it can still be scary and fun at the same time.
You better have friends because 90% of the lobbies in this game are infested by modders, if there are any lobbies at all
Fun to play with friends every once in a while, but this is definitely a friend slop game.
its very fun and scary and personally worth the money but maybe only get it if u have friends to play with because its better with people u actually know
Great game but does not have much activity or updates. There is also a large amount of trolls and griefers, so I would have bought this if it were on sale. It's great, but it needs work..
its very fun and aslo hard , but gets boring after a while cause if u die 3 times in a row and fail the objective u start from 0
ITs amazing but the more friends the better. Also the reporter mic is fun to interview monsters (and die)
really fun game with friends but lacks updates

"oh ♥♥♥♥ is that the boston dynamics robot dog---" *mic cuts out*

This game is a lovely remix of what makes Lethal Company great. You aren't running from the horrors here (not at first). You're chasing them down into the dark, and they're sure not happy about it. Quite a bit of fun if you love close calls and making some absurd bits with your friends.

So much fun to play with friends or solo I really hope they keep updating the game we have just got to day 8 so fingers crossed - only saw flicker once and seem to keep seeing the streamer at the moment but yuh great game pls keep updating it x
one of the best games I have played with all the monsters and mechanics it was a blast!!!!!!!!
Really funj with friends the trampoline is def the best part of the surface i love being able to double bouncce
Dear god no Its not neassary wrong with the game but its broing horror game but it has bugslap but play the god backrooms !

It really depends on how you play it. Single player is like a 3/10, 2 people, like a 8/10, and if you get a trio or 4 stack, this game is a 9/10. For 10 bucks, i recommend buying it (if you have people to play it with).
spider is very cute and cuddly as a matter of fact all of them are cute and cuddly and the only thing scary abt this game was my friend suku who was making obnoxious screams the whole time

only fun with friends honestly. its a good game but entirely dependent on having a large group constantly to have fun. this "friendslop" is getting boring. But the game is well designed and is actually scary at times. I love the interactions your able to have in game with the camera and acting like a news reporter or a streamer etc. good game, just needs to be fun without tons of friends

Alright solo but playing with friends is really fun. One big problem i have while playing is that its very easy to get lost. 9/10 with friend. 4/10 solo.

Edit: after playing 3 more hours Playing with friends this game is a 10/10

This game had a great idea going but just not enough content(haha get it). It only has like 2 maps, a lot of monsters which is good but you will get bored kinda quickly. If they added more maps and a few more mechanics it would have been peak, sad that they dropped this game a while ago.

I consistently lag along with common glitches such as losing items out of my inventory randomly and watching the video on the tv not rewarding views ending runs, also the game has a crappy gameplay loop with no interesting differences after the first few runs. The only reason i have 4 hours of playtime is because that is how long it took for me to get bored and wait for friends, so the gameplay loop only lasts around 3 hours in all actuality.
The fact that this game was supposed to be a simple april fools game is crazy

This is the best "Horror" game I have ever played. It is the perfect mix of fear and fun with friends. It has an amazing customization variety, from hats to faces you can type. The graphics are very unique, and the currency system is great. there are barely any glitches, and the achievements are extremely versatile. The game is very hard, but it is one of those games where losing is just as fun as winning. Overall ratings: 5/5 stars.

The game is fun on an initial pickup, but after that it becomes very stale very quick.
For most people this game won't like more than 3 or 4 play sessions, and for that reason I don't think it's worth the price, even for as low as it is.

its so fun with funny moments but i do wish there where more people in servers but its fine i really like the results after you see a vid that ya made its sad when you lose good fodege and after you cannot get it the next day in game still fun very sure its free

This game has to be one of the most awesome games I've played before. It's pretty multiplayer friendly, and you can always meet new people online. I've met two new awesome friends here, and honestly, just playing this is a blast. Definitely worth my money
its a fun game with friends and i think there is a lot of funny times, should highly recommend it with playing friends
very skibib game the guy i was talking with jumped off screaming 10k slurs

Very fun and enjoyable. Played for hours on end and it is still fun. The horror is bad and not bad at the same time. There are some jumpscares but because of the wide open map you can run and see the monsters from a distance.

Non-functional game with laggy, buggy interactions, major desync issues etc. Inexcusable to have game-breaking bugs commonly exist in the game after this long since release. If these are fixed I will update my review but I'm considering refunding the game.

this game is awsome it is one of my favorite games it is really funny and also has scary and coo moments. the best part is that you can save your favorite content warning videos to you own computer or pc!
fun game good to play with friends and it is a funny horror game is little scary

It's good and fun, but has some issues. Controllers have bad default controls, attempting to join a random server will sometimes cause you to host one, and there is no way to select specific servers unless someone gives you the server code. This means players will use mods and/or soundboards and be annoying and the game might just queue you up in the same server over and over again. Cool concept of having to record monsters and scary things, my favorite part is at the end of the day when you get to sit down and watch the video you recorded.
A very fun multiplayer game. there can be many funny moments in this game, caused by the monsters or people your playing with. i wouldn't recommend playing alone though.
10/10 peak gameplay. Not too scary monster design, but very suspensful. I would reccomend

Content Warning? More like... uh. Content Good- ing.

This game is great, it's got the camera, it's got the suits, it's got the whisk that destroys my insides, and it's got the friends- wait, I- uh. yeah.

This game is incredible, 10/10, would die on camera again! (no Diana)
Vey fun with friends also very creative, Would Recommend! Graphics aren't intensive, so most of, if not all, pc's can handle it easily!
Really fun with friends, I wouldn't recommend going solo as it can get boring, the mods are REALLY fun as well and it's overall an awesome game
very scary survived barnicle big slap and flicker first time i played the game

this is the game you play with your funniest friends, screaming and doing stuff while recording it, then looking at the footage you made is the best part of this game, may get stale after like 200 games though, and don't play alone, it's not good trust me

So listen here the only updates are bug fixes and the crossplay update ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ broke the game like bro and its only fun cuz of your friends which its hard to get someone to play a game that costs money and being alone is boring so save the like 5 bucks and get something like gta or payday
I really like this game because of the variety of monsters and maps. I recommend playing with at least three people to make it fun.
Great game for hanging out with the boys and overall a amazing game
fun to play with friends but not enough maps, items, and gets repetitive really fast, would be super fun if there were more content drops
I mean its a good, fun game, but not really worth the 8 dollars unless you have really fun to play with freinds, 7/10
This game is amazing! I love the free voice chat and NO age verification! great game other than the mod stacking issue.
really need to fix the camera being in the ship on the third day and it just says you failed happened a few times now and has ruined our games.

Devs haven't done anything with the game in forever. Fixed a few bugs after what 2 years and only because of console? but there's still plenty left and they have basically left the game to rot. Was fun only briefly, honestly.
It is fun, all the goofiness, funny moments and monsters are good, even with mods, its ABSOLOUTE amazing def give this game a 5 star rating. Also worth buying.
So far great, I am not big on horror, but regardless, good game, it's unique and the camera feature is amazing
my only real complaint is that the spectating system sucks balls, otherwise very fun
Fun co-op horror crossplay game, although maps are lacking along with time it takes to unlock everything the variety of enemies are great.
I don't know why but the game doesn't work - hasn't worked for 1 year now- because the game keeps infinitely  connecting.

Insanely fun and scary. This game is so chaotic and its so fun to run from monsters while still trying to film them. The camera mechanics are amazing and very well designed creating a very cool found footage feel. if you have friends to play this with dont hesitate buying it
It's fire. But it's better to play with 2 plus people than playing solo. But other than that 10/10 game.
really fun and creative game put please we need more maps and gadgets
great game to play with friends, being able to save videos of your adventures is a plus, 9/10

good game there is a lot of bugs with starting the game and watching the film but other then that its a good game: update let us go in a list of servers that are open and let us pick what one we want still a good game

I can't say I really hate the game: it's not laggy, is has the decent graphics and it's pretty funny but! It never gives you an actual freedom. You're stuck in three days until you use the perfect strategy and, of course, have 4 people in your team for doing everything at the same time. Otherwise - enjoy resetting the world every three in-game days.
Absolutely great bonding game. Except if you don't have friends.. then its boring
